items.name: 4WD Smart Robot Car Chassis Kit
items.description: Acrylic or aluminum platform with 4× TT gearmotor mounts and mounting holes.
items.notes: Get a 4WD kit that includes the motors and wheels. Search '4WD robot chassis kit' on Amazon.

items.name: TT DC Gearmotor (3-6V, ~200RPM)
items.description: Yellow TT motor with gear reduction. Dual shaft preferred for encoder disc.

items.name: Rubber Wheels (65mm)
items.description: Press-fit wheels for TT motor D-shaft.

items.name: M3 Nylon Standoffs Kit
items.description: For mounting Pi, PCA9685, and sensor boards above chassis.
items.notes: Assorted pack. Need ~20mm for Pi, ~10mm for PCA9685.

items.name: PCA9685 16-Channel 12-bit PWM Servo Driver (I2C)
items.description: Controls all motors via I2C using only 2 GPIO pins. 12-bit PWM, 16 channels, chainable.
items.notes: Channels 0-11 drive 2× L298N (4 motors). Channels 12-15 spare for camera servos or gripper.

items.name: L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver
items.description: Drives 2 DC motors per board. Direction + speed control. Built-in flyback diodes.
items.notes: L298N #1 drives front-left + front-right. L298N #2 drives rear-left + rear-right. Both controlled by PCA9685.

items.name: Jumper Wires (Female-Female)
items.description: Pi GPIO → PCA9685, PCA9685 → L298N, sensor connections.
items.notes: Get a pack of 40. You'll use ~25 for this build.

items.name: 4× AA Battery Holder with Switch and JST Connector
items.description: Series holder for 4 AA cells (4.8-6V). On/off switch for motor kill.
items.notes: Powers both L298N boards and PCA9685 V+ rail.

items.name: AA NiMH Rechargeable Batteries (1.2V, 2000mAh)
items.notes: Eneloop or Amazon Basics. Get a charger if needed.

items.name: 5V USB Power Bank (5000mAh+, 2.5A output)
items.description: Powers the Raspberry Pi via micro-USB.
items.notes: Must NOT auto-shutoff. Must supply 2.5A continuous. Small and lightweight.

items.name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Distance Sensor

specs.echo_output: 5V TTL — REQUIRES voltage divider for Pi (3.3V max)

items.notes: Front-mounted. ECHO pin needs 1kΩ/2kΩ voltage divider to bring 5V down to 3.33V for Pi GPIO.

items.name: GY-291 ADXL345 3-Axis Digital Accelerometer
items.description: 3-axis accelerometer, ±2g to ±16g selectable range, I2C/SPI interface.
items.notes: Center-mounted, flat on chassis. Provides tilt, collision detection, and basic orientation. Shares I2C bus with PCA9685 (different address).

items.name: ArduCam IMX708 Camera Module
items.notes: Already connected and tested. Front-facing, 15-20° downward tilt.

items.name: 2kΩ Resistor (1/4W)
items.description: HC-SR04 ECHO voltage divider (lower leg, to GND).

items.name: 100nF Ceramic Capacitor
items.notes: Solder directly across each motor's terminals. 2 per motor.

items.name: Mini Breadboard (170-point)
items.description: For voltage divider and sensor wiring.

need_to_buy: 4WD chassis kit with 4× TT motors + wheels ($20-30)
5V USB power bank ($10-15, or use existing)
